description: Create a two-column content slide on public unease about technology and world security, using two text blocks with icon-led section headers and a right-side photo panel.

header.headline: Unease about the role of technology and world security isn’t going away

left.title: The public outlook for technology for 2025

items.text: Navigating a world of technological dualities.
items.sub: The global public continues to hold a complex and often contradictory view of technology's future, marked by both anticipation and apprehension.

items.text: Fear of AI-driven job losses (65%) continues to outweigh the expectation of AI-driven job creation (43%).
items.sub: This trend echoes previous years, but the gap appears to be slightly narrowing.

items.text: Optimism shines in China, where 77% foresee AI creating jobs, while concerns dominate in Japan, with 65% predicting job losses.
